title: Lou Sang Town Visual Backfill Pilot
notes: This pilot covers the Lou Sang town center slice and proves one full replacement loop: reconstructed town tileset subset, three NPC standing sprites, and one dialogue UI panel style. Every replacement stays chapter-local, routes only through the shared asset registry, and keeps gameplay/content data unchanged. / 这一试点覆盖楼桑村镇中心切片，用来证明一条完整替换闭环：重建后的城镇 tileset 子集、3 个 NPC 站立帧，以及 1 类对话 UI 面板样式。所有替换都保持在章节局部范围内，只通过共享 asset registry 生效，并且不改 gameplay/content 数据。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local town tileset override to revert to the shared placeholder palette. / 删除章节局部的 town tileset override，即可回退到共享 placeholder palette。

verification.notes: Town tileset backfill must preserve movement, collision, portal traversal, battle return, and save/load stability. / town tileset 回填后必须保持移动、碰撞、切图、战斗返回和存档读档稳定。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the reconstructed Lou Sang town palette subset without touching world runtime or map data. / 锁定楼桑村重建 tileset palette 子集，不改 world runtime 或地图数据。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local guard sprite binding to revert to the shared placeholder NPC marker. / 删除章节局部守卫 sprite 绑定，即可回退到共享 placeholder NPC 标记。

verification.notes: Guard sprite replacement must not affect gate blocking, gate opening, or exit traversal. / 守卫 sprite 替换后不能影响门卫阻拦、门卫放行和出口通行。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the gate guard's reconstructed standing frame for the first real chapter pilot. / 锁定第一真实章节试点中的门卫重建站立帧。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local merchant sprite binding to revert to the shared placeholder NPC marker. / 删除章节局部商人 sprite 绑定，即可回退到共享 placeholder NPC 标记。

verification.notes: Merchant sprite replacement must keep shop opening and save/load paths stable. / 商人 sprite 替换后应保持商店打开和存档读档路径稳定。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the merchant standing frame for the pilot slice. / 锁定试点切片中的商人站立帧。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local guide sprite binding to revert to the shared placeholder NPC marker. / 删除章节局部向导 sprite 绑定，即可回退到共享 placeholder NPC 标记。

verification.notes: Guide sprite replacement must keep chapter entry interaction and save/load stable. / 向导 sprite 替换后应保持章节入口交互和存档读档稳定。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the guide standing frame for the pilot slice. / 锁定试点切片中的向导站立帧。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local dialogue panel override to revert to the shared placeholder dialogue panel. / 删除章节局部对话框 override，即可回退到共享 placeholder 对话框。

verification.notes: Dialogue panel replacement must keep dialogue open/close timing, reveal, skip, battle return, and save/load visibility paths stable. / 对话框替换后必须保持对话开关时机、逐字显示、跳过、战斗返回和存档读档可见路径稳定。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks one UI class for the pilot without expanding to full menu or shop reskin. / 在试点中锁定一类 UI 资产，但不扩展到完整菜单或商店重绘。
